meaning: n.滑铁卢,惨败,沃特卢(美国衣阿华州东北部城市),沃特卢(加拿大东南部城市)
examples: The building is a commemoration of the battle of Waterloo.
Richard Long's A Line Made By Walking, however, involved nothing more strenuous than a 20-minute train ride from Waterloo.
This was the point at which he was to meet his Waterloo.
We kicked our Waterloo to West End wander off at the Jubiloo on Southbank.
It now appears that, in Belgium, it's acceptable to film the dead from Waterloo but not from WWI.
